stylePrefix: Moody painterly matte-illustration game art, flat-shaded low-poly aesthetic with soft directional lighting, warm dusk-orange and overcast slate-blue palette, isolated foggy coastal lighthouse-island mood, muted weathered color grading, subtle grain, no text, no watermark, no logo —
modelNote: generate_image was called with model='nano_banana_pro' for every asset; the Higgsfield API silently routed all nine jobs to 'nano_banana_2' instead (visible in each job's params.model in the raw job_status response). Not something this integration chose — flagged here since it's a live-behavior detail worth knowing about, not a hidden substitution.

assets.name: textures/ground
assets.prompt: a seamless tileable top-down texture of coastal dirt-and-gravel path ground, patchy dry grass and packed earth, small pebbles, flat even lighting with no shadows or highlights, no horizon, no objects, no characters

assets.name: textures/rock
assets.prompt: a seamless tileable top-down texture of weathered grey coastal rock and boulder surface, cracked stone with lichen patches, flat even lighting with no shadows or highlights, no horizon, no objects, no characters

assets.name: textures/wood
assets.prompt: a seamless tileable top-down texture of old weathered dark wood planks, salt-worn grain, faint cracks, flat even lighting with no shadows or highlights, no horizon, no objects, no characters

assets.name: textures/metal
assets.prompt: a seamless tileable top-down texture of rusted worn metal plate, oxidized brass-and-iron surface with scratches and patina, flat even lighting with no shadows or highlights, no horizon, no objects, no characters

assets.name: skybox
assets.prompt: a wide panoramic dusk sky vista over a lonely sea horizon, layered overcast clouds glowing orange near the horizon fading to deep slate-blue overhead, no ground, no islands, no buildings, no birds, no characters, seamless left-to-right horizon band

assets.name: props/photo-dock
assets.prompt: an aged vintage photograph, slightly faded warm sepia tone, of a middle-aged lighthouse keeper man and a younger laughing woman with wind-blown hair, standing together on a wooden dock, pencil-written corner, candid snapshot composition
assets.error: Error starting generation: Out of credits in the selected workspace.

assets.name: portraits/mara
assets.prompt: a character portrait, waist-up, three-quarter view, of Mara Kessel, a stocky weathered middle-aged female supply-boat captain with a gruff guarded expression and sun-worn skin, wearing a navy oilskin coat and a yellow sou'wester hat, coastal dock backdrop

freeTierRecheck.result: No free-tier credit reset or daily allotment exists on the free plan. Only $0 option is a 3-day MCP-only trial (100 credits) that requires a card on file and auto-charges $49/mo after 3 days unless cancelled — treated as purchase-adjacent, not used, per user instruction not to purchase.
